import React from'react';import{useTheme}from'../../contexts/ThemeContext';import'./Loading.css';/**
 * A reusable loading component that displays a spinner or skeleton based on the current theme.
 * It can be customized with different sizes and messages.
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Loading=_ref=>{let{size='medium',message='Loading...',fullScreen=false}=_ref;const{theme}=useTheme();const loadingClasses=['loading-spinner',"theme-".concat(theme),"size-".concat(size),fullScreen?'full-screen':''].filter(Boolean).join(' ');return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"loading-container ".concat(fullScreen?'full-screen':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:loadingClasses,"aria-hidden":"true",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"spinner-inner"})}),message&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"loading-message",children:message})]});};export default Loading;
